channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: AI-Generated Fan Songs Are Trending Ahead Of 2026 World Cup
item.description: As the 2026 World Cup dey approach, football fans don begin dey use artificial intelligence to create plenty fan-made songs wey dey trend online. This kind music dey celebrate teams like France, Brazi...

item.title: Oxford University develops experimental vaccine for rare Bundibugyo Ebola outbreak
item.description: Scientists at Oxford University are urgently developing a new vaccine aimed at the rare Bundibugyo strain of Ebola, which has no currently proven vaccine. The outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Co...

item.title: New York Times Reporter Highlights Somalia's Humanitarian Crisis Following Aid Cuts and Regional Conflicts
item.description: In a recent interview on CNN's Amanpour, New York Times reporter Peter Goodman shared his firsthand observations from a trip to Somalia, where the combined effects of the Iran war and significant cuts...

item.title: South Africa sees decline in murders but violent crime remains high
item.description: South Africa has reported a decrease in its national murder rate, with 546 fewer lives lost in the first quarter of 2026 compared with the same period last year. Police Minister Firoz Cachalia highlig...

item.title: TNT Tropang Giga looks for new import after Bol Bol suffers Achilles injury
item.description: MANILA, Philippines – TNT Tropang Giga is facing a major setback in the 2026 PBA Commissioner’s Cup semifinals after star import Bol Bol sustained a suspected partial Achilles tear. The 7-foot-3 forme...

item.title: Canadian Retail Sales Rise Mostly Due to Price Increases, Not Stronger Consumer Spending
item.description: Recent data shows that Canada's retail sales have increased, but economists caution that this growth is largely due to higher prices rather than a genuine boost in consumer demand. Rising costs of goo...

item.title: Police shoot driver during attempted escape in Whitefield
item.description: Armed officers from Greater Manchester Police (GMP) discharged a firearm at a 20-year-old motorist who allegedly drove directly at them while attempting to evade arrest on Bury New Road in Whitefield,...

item.title: Ann Todd: British Actress Known for Her Role in The Seventh Veil and Hollywood Collaborations
item.description: Ann Todd (1909–1993) was a prominent English actress and producer who achieved significant fame during the golden age of British cinema. Nicknamed the 'Pocket Venus' by the press for her petite frame ...

item.title: Pep Guardiola to leave Manchester City after ten years in charge
item.description: Pep Guardiola, the 55-year-old Catalan football coach, has announced he will step down as Manchester City manager at the end of this season, finishing a remarkable ten-year tenure. Since joining the c...

item.title: Indus Hospital Mourns Loss of Dr Naseem Salahuddin, Leading Infectious Diseases Specialist
item.description: Dr Naseem Salahuddin, a highly respected infectious diseases specialist and professor emeritus at Indus Hospital, passed away on Friday. She had been serving as the head of the infectious diseases dep...

item.title: WHO warns of very high Ebola risk in DRC as cases rise
item.description: The World Health Organisation (WHO) don increase the risk level for the Bundibugyo Ebola virus for Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) to 'very high' because the virus dey spread fast and plenty people...

item.title: Miley Cyrus Reflects on Hannah Montana, Music, and Life Lessons Ahead of Walk of Fame Honor
item.description: Miley Cyrus, Grammy-winning singer and former Disney Channel star, is set to receive a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame on May 22, 2026. The announcement comes shortly after the 20th anniversary spe...

item.title: Joseph Selasini Resigns from NCCR-Mageuzi and Returns to Chadema Citing Political Differences
item.description: Former Rombo Member of Parliament Joseph Selasini has officially left NCCR-Mageuzi and gone back to Chadema party. He made the announcement in Arusha on May 22, 2026, calling his previous departure a ...

item.title: Government and Industry Collaborate to Strengthen Domestic Manufacturing
item.description: On 22nd May 2026, Commerce and Industry Minister Piyush Goyal chaired an inter-ministerial meeting along with officials and representatives from major industry associations in New Delhi. The discussio...

item.title: Government conducts first performance review of ministries on delays and grievance handling
item.description: For the very first time, the Indian government has carried out a structured performance assessment of various ministries and departments. This review focused on administrative efficiency, including de...

item.title: Fire breaks out at encampment near Highway 400 in Barrie
item.description: A fire broke out at an encampment located off Highway 400 in Barrie on May 22, 2026. Barrie Fire Services responded promptly to the incident to contain the blaze and ensure public safety. While specif...

item.title: Shiksha Arora: Kenyan TV personality and her family story
item.description: Shiksha Arora is a Kenyan media personality of Indian descent who has become popular for her energetic presence on TV and social media. Born and raised in Kenya, Shiksha identifies as Sikh and belongs...

item.title: Former Bureaucrats Raise Concerns Over CJI’s Remarks on Environmental Activists
item.description: A group of retired civil servants in India has expressed serious concern over comments made by Chief Justice Surya Kant during a hearing related to the Pipavav port expansion project in Gujarat. On Ma...

item.title: Australian Jewish Activist Highlights Anti-Zionist Jews Facing Hostility
item.description: Judith Treanor, an Australian-British Jewish activist, has publicly shared her experiences of antisemitism from Zionist groups due to her outspoken opposition to Israeli government policies. Treanor e...

item.title: Jody Yeh: Mum of Chef Molly Yeh and Her Journey from Music to Social Work
item.description: Jody Yeh, born on 16 October 1955 in the USA, is the mother of American celebrity chef and blogger Molly Yeh. She is of Hungarian-Jewish descent and grew up partly in New York before moving to Gurnee,...
